pageContent.generalInfo: Welcome to the Bishop Estates Cabana Club!
pageContent.poolInfo: Our beautiful pool is open daily from 9 AM to 8 PM. Remember to follow all posted rules.
pageContent.updates: Exciting news! We're starting renovations soon. Stay tuned for progress reports.
